text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's New Year's Day, and I decide to head to a
shrine to pray, but when I get there...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Here you go! ☆ It's warm and very buono!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I find Hishi Akebono among the shopkeepers,
handing out amazake to shrine visitors.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Oh! Hi, Trainer! Happy New Year!
choice_data_list: Happy New Year. What's with the amazake?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
When I was in the shopping district, I saw a
recruitment flyer for volunteers, so I signed up to
help!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
My job is to make lots of amazake and then hand
cups of it out to everyone.

text_block_list.name: Shopkeeper A
text_block_list.text: Bono's been a great help. She's so strong!

text_block_list.name: Shopkeeper B
text_block_list.text:
And she was the one who suggested we offer
drinks other than amazake.

text_block_list.name: Shopkeeper B
text_block_list.text:
A lot more people than usual have been coming
up to get drinks. It's really great!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Ehehe! Aw, I hardly did anything.
choice_data_list: Oh, you're offering more than just amazake?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taking a closer look at the stand, I see cups of
coffee and hot chocolate among the amazake.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Some people don't like amazake, so I thought it'd
be nice to have other drinks they can warm
themselves up with!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Oh, let me get you something, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
What would you like? The amazake's full of
vitamins and very nutritious.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
We brewed the coffee with beans we bought from
a cafe in the shopping district. You'll be ready for
anything after a cup of that stuff! ♪

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: The hot chocolate's great too, though. There's something special about its deliciousness!
choice_data_list: I'll have the coffee, so I'll be ready for anything!

I'll drink the hot chocolate, for that special
power!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Okay! This'll make your tummy feel nice and
toasty!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She hands me a cup of amazake. It tastes
absolutely delicious with its full-bodied sweetness
and smooth, creamy texture.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: I'm glad to hear it!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
We've been simmering it since last night. It's been
really fun!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Oh, right! You came up in conversation while we
were making the amazake!

text_block_list.name: Shopkeeper B
text_block_list.text:
Yes, she told us how kind and dependable you
are, and about how much you mean to her.

text_block_list.name: Shopkeeper B
text_block_list.text: She also said you always look really happy when you eat the food she makes, didn't she?

text_block_list.name: Shopkeeper C
text_block_list.text: She did! And when Bono said how much enjoys making food for you, well!

text_block_list.name: Shopkeeper B
text_block_list.text:
Oops, sorry! It's been some time since we last
talked about something so sweet and cute, so we
got a little rowdy there!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! You know, it's really funny when everyone
gets so giddy!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I spend the rest of the day having a great time
hanging out with everyone from the shopping
district.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Roger! ♪ Would you like any sugar or milk?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I ask for both and carefully take the warm coffee
she hands me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The coffee has a rich aroma and a distinctive
flavor. It's absolutely delectable.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: I'm so happy you like it! I really love it too!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I bought some beans for myself, too. We should
brew some more coffee the next time we have
cake together!

text_block_list.name: Visitor
text_block_list.text: Excuse me, could I have some amazake, please?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Of course! Coming right up! ♪

text_block_list.name: Visitor
text_block_list.text: Wait... Aren't you Bono?!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: I am! Oh, are you...

text_block_list.name: Visitor
text_block_list.text: Yes, I'm a fan! I was just thinking you looked really familiar, but I can't believe it's really you!

text_block_list.name: Visitor
text_block_list.text:
I was amazed by how powerful and impressive you
were in that race I watched! Or rather, I was
hopelessly smitten!

text_block_list.name: Visitor
text_block_list.text:
I'm really excited to see you race against Biko in
the Takamatsunomiya Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe! It's kind of embarrassing getting all this
praise, but thank you! I'll do my best!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After taking a cup of amazake, the woman walks
away, waving happily at Hishi Akebono as she
goes.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
You want the hot chocolate? You've got good
taste, Trainer! ♪

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: I hope it's to your liking! Hehe!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She hands me a cup of hot chocolate. Its rich,
distinctive flavor is wonderfully tasty.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Isn't it just?! I love it too!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Just then...

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Hey, Bono! And Bono's trainer!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Ah, Biko! Happy New Year!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Happy New Year! What are you up to?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I'm helping pass out warm drinks! Would you like
one while you're here?

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Ooh! I think I'll have a hot chocolate, plea—

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Wait, I cannot! I'm in a hurry right now! They're
broadcasting a special New Year's feature on
heroes today!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Oh dear! You definitely don't want to miss that!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Exactly! I rushed here so I could get my prayers
done quick!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for the offer, but I'm afraid I must decline!
Good luck, Bono!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Thanks! See you later!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: I wonder what Biko's going to pray for?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I really hope she prays to do well at the
Takamatsunomiya Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Oh, by the way, have you prayed yet, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Really? Excuse me! Is it okay if I go and pay my
respects with my trainer, please?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I want us to pray together to show that we're
going to work hard as a team!

text_block_list.name: Shopkeeper A
text_block_list.text:
Sure. Things are pretty slow right now anyway, so
go ahead!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Thank you! I'll be right back!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having received permission, we hurry and join the
queue to pray.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Clap! Clap!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Don't forget what you're praying for, Trainer! ☆

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
We're asking for help with doing our best at the
Takamatsunomiya Kinen—and all the other races
after that, too!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Hehe! Praying at a shrine just fills me up with power, you know? It's like wh-wh-whoosh!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna work really hard this year! Let's do our
very best, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, we kick off the new year on a bright and
cheery note! Here's to a good year for us both!
